ogTitle: Calwell vs Canberra Airport: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Calwell and Canberra Airport.
heading: Calwell vs Canberra Airport — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Calwell, Australian Capital Territory and Canberra Airport, Australian Capital Territory. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Canberra Airport has a lower overall climate risk score (35/100) compared to Calwell (36/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Calwell or Canberra Airport safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Calwell has a flood risk score of 30/100, while Canberra Airport scores 26/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Calwell scores 45/100 for bushfire risk. Canberra Airport scores 50/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Calwell or Canberra Airport?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Canberra Airport has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.95% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
